title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 221.330 - Organization of board
text:
221.330.  Organization of board. — The persons appointed as members of the board of county visitors, within one week after receiving notice of appointment, shall meet at some convenient place, and organize by electing a chairman and secretary from their own number.  The secretary shall file a report of such organization, signed by him or herself, and by the said chairman, with the clerk of the circuit court of the county.
(RSMo 1939 § 9587) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12947; 1919 § 12196; 1909 § 1330
